/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/proxy.dir/src/proxy/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proxy.dir/src/main.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/proxy.dir/src/proxy/http-request.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/proxy.dir/src/proxy/router.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proxy.dir/src/logging/logger.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/proxy.dir/src/proxy/thread-pool.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/proxy.dir/src/logging/sql-logger.cpp.o" -o proxy   -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libpq/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/libpq/lib -lpq
